notableEvents.label: Jo Adell reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wade Meckler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wade Meckler grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Wade Meckler out at 1st.
